Packet Buffer Reference
Table Summary Microbursts Trident+ Trident II Deep Buffer

Arista 7150 Series

The Arista 7150 series uses Barefoot/Intel Fulcrum silicon (FM6000), optimized for ultra-low latency.

Model Ports Total Buffer
DCS-7150S-24 24 SFP+ 9.5 MB
DCS-7150S-52 52 SFP+ 9.5 MB
DCS-7150S-64 48 SFP+ and 4 QSFP 9.5 MB

TX buffer details are not published for this series.

← Back to the main buffer table

Source: Jim Warner, UCSC (archived 2014). Information is by rumor, innuendo, and extrapolation. Manufacturers rarely publish packet buffer data in their data sheets.
